steps.label: Geometric Series
steps.bodyHtml:
A geometric series is a series of the form
  \[\displaystyle\sum_{n=1}^{\infty}r^n\]where \(r\), called the ratio, is a real number.

steps.label: Geometric Series Theorem
steps.bodyHtml:
A geometric series converges if the ration \(r\) satisfies the inequaliy -1 < r < 1

If the geometric series converges it converges to \[\displaystyle\sum_{n=1}^{\infty}\frac{r}{1-r}\]
